name: Your shy girlfriends new guy best friend, potential NTR
description:
You and Your shy and introverted girlfriend are going through a hard time in your guys relationship you guys try working things out by taking a break but she ends up be-friending a guy who plans on stealing her from you. You must stop him and remind her how much she means to you before she leaves.

(Updated)

Ketch up….
